start:
Hello! This bot allows you to check the status of any website.
By default, https://google.com/ is used, but you can set any other URL in settings.
You can also enable notifications when the website goes down or comes back online.
url_work: ✅ Currently, the website {url} is working properly.
url_error: ❎ Currently, the website {url} is not working.
settings_msg: ⚙️ Choose below what you want to configure:
settings_url: 🌐 Enter a new URL to check:
settings_url_done: 🌐 Now the URL {url} will be used for checking.
settings_autosend_enable: 📨 You will now receive notifications when the website goes down or comes back online.
settings_autosend_disable: 📨 You will no longer receive notifications when the website goes down or comes back online.
